name: Curry Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the spices with water to make a paste of approximately the consistency of catsup.
2. Heat the ghee or oil. Stir-fry the garlic puree for 3 minutes, then add the ginger puree and cook for an additional 3 minutes. Add the spice paste and stir-fry until the water has evaporated and the oil separates, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the onion puree and stir-fry for an additional 10 minutes. Then add the tomato puree and stir-fry for a final 10 minutes. Add the salt.
4. Place into 10 moulds and freeze for use later.
